title: antennaria carpatica
intro: Antennaria carpatica, also known as mountain silver or mountain everlasting, is a perennial flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of North America and Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can be beneficial in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Antennaria carpatica include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and soothing digestive problems, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. Antennaria carpatica can be prepared for medicinal use through teas, infusions, tinctures, and salves, allowing for a range of applications and dosages to suit individual needs.
